name: VideoMemory
description: Camera monitoring, one-off frame questions, and VideoMemory host onboarding for OpenClaw.

baseUrl.description: VideoMemory base URL reachable from the OpenClaw host.

repoRef.description: VideoMemory git branch or tag used for host onboarding and relaunch.

repoDir.description: Optional host checkout directory for VideoMemory.

openclawHome.description: Optional OpenClaw home directory. Defaults to ~/.openclaw.

autoStart.description: If true, the plugin starts/onboards VideoMemory when the gateway starts.

safeMode.description: Run onboarding without sudo/Tailscale setup, model-key copying, or Telegram side effects.

syncModelKeys.description: Allow onboarding to copy model provider API keys from the OpenClaw host environment into VideoMemory.

allowTailscaleSetup.description: Allow onboarding to attempt Tailscale setup when safeMode is false.

notifyTelegram.description: Allow onboarding to send the UI link through Telegram when credentials are already configured.
